name: Chicken Fried Steak with Cream Grav
recipeIngredient: 1 Round Steak (Cut About 1-Inch Thick, about 2 lbs)
Salt and Freshly Ground Pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 4 Servings
1. Cut the steak crosswise into 4 serving pieces.
2. Place one piece between two sheets of plastic wrap. Pound with a rolling pin or meat tenderizer to a thickness of 1/4 inch. Repeat with remaining pieces.
3. In a pie plate, beat together milk and eggs.
4. In a second pie plate, combine flour and seasonings (salt and pepper).
5. Dip each piece first into egg mixture, then into the flour mixture, coating completely.
6. Shake off excess flour.
7. Melt butter in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
8. Fry steaks two at a time about 5 minutes on each side or until golden brown on both sides.
9. Serve with biscuits and cream gravy. Each serving without gravy contains: Cal Pro Fat Carbohydrates
